name: symfinity/ux-blocks
description: UX Blocks base SDK — registry schema and Symfinity UI markup helpers for Symfony UX Twig components

suggest.symfinity/ui-kernel: Token-driven role CSS and flavours when building styled blocks
suggest.symfinity/ui-action: Native HTTP action semantics for interactive blocks (layer 3)
suggest.symfony/ux-icons: Icon set for roles that use ux:icon (optional per app)
